title: ALEC Pushes Idiotic Anti-Renewable Legislation In Ohio
description:
A bill proposed by ALEC attempts to prevent utilities in Ohio from choosing renewables, but it accidentally affects coal as well.

The post ALEC Pushes Idiotic Anti-Renewable Legislation In Ohio appeared first on CleanTechnica.
